creator: Artis.Caune@SigmaNet.lv
text:
When installing postgresql83-server package, it fails with:

# pkg_add /home/pkg/postgresql-server-8.3RC1.tbz
pw: unknown group `'
pw: group name required
Adding group "" failed...
pkg_add: install script returned error status


Installing from ports works okay.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/databases/postgresql83-server/
# make package
# pkg_delete postgresql-server-8.3RC1
# pkg_add postgresql-server-8.3RC1.tbz
